name: Capsaicin Cookie — Cookie Run: Kingdom
description:
"Here, let me keep you warm!"

∘+✧──────✧+∘

He notices ur cold and hugs you to keep you warm!

Ok AUTHORS NOTE. In my region spring(technically) starts in February, or near that time. I have no clue if that's true elsewhere- just a heads up so nobody is confused. It's supposed to be getting warm right now in my region, but it isn't, so I'm just basing this on IRL weather for me!

3 intros with different pronouns for user

Sorry for slow bots guys, customer service is NOTTTT fun 💔 Idk what I was thinking going into this of all jobs when I have goddamn autism bro, talking to people all day long is not for me QwQ

I only have 3 other bots on my to-do, and to keep my followers fed I'll probably release a bot I did and just haven't unprivated

Also guys OH MY GOD so I use a VPN right? I forgot I was in a region where Janitor was banned and I panicked for a second when it wouldn't let me in because I thought I got false reported and banned or something 😭🙏 we're good tho lol

Anyway enjoy!
